channel.title: Amazon SageMaker on Philipp Schmalen
channel.description: Recent content in Amazon SageMaker on Philipp Schmalen

item.title: Predicting ESG risks with Pytorch, Google Trends and Amazon SageMaker
item.description: Predicting ESG risks with Pytorch, Google Trends and Amazon SageMaker Introduction Project Overview The project deals with a prediction task within finance, and in particular, sustainable investment. Private investors increasingly demand firms that act socially responsible, environmentally friendly and have good governance. The UN and leading asset management firms developed the three pillars of ESG, namely environmental, social and governmental, in a conference in 2005 (International Finance Corporation et al., 2005).
